  • AI & GenAI Prototyping: Contribute to projects involving Large Language Models (LLMs) and Generative AI.
  • Collaboration: Work independently and as part of a senior global team, sharing knowledge and supporting innovative initiatives.
  • Continuous Learning: Stay motivated to learn new AI/LLM technologies and apply them to real-world healthcare challenges.

Required Skills & Experience:

  • Experience in programming and software development (ideally C#, Python, or similar).
  • Willingness and motivation to learn and work with new, possibly ever-changing technologies. The tech stack changes are frequent and fluid.
  • Hands-on experience with Cloud services (deployment, integration, monitoring).
  • Ability to work independently and drive tasks end-to-end.
  • Experience with deploying and integrating software modules/components.
  • Unnderstanding of AI and LLM concepts and experience applying them is welcomed; strong motivation to learn and apply these technologies is essential.
  • Experience in healthcare or medical technology is a plus but not required.

Basic wage component (gross) and other rewards : starting from 2100 EUR brutto /month + VAR*

  • We are required by law to disclose basic wage component (minimum salary) for the advertised positions. We carefully consider your professional qualifications and experience in our compensation package and/or when offering you other positions.

Our goal is to pay our employee's fairly, with regard to the market situation and we are ready to welcome high-quality candidates in our team.

What We Offer:

  • Variable and Christmas bonus
  • Flexible Working Hours
  • Bridge days – free extra paid leave 6 days per year
  • 3 sick days per year (no doctor’s permit needed)
  • In case of sickness 100% salary reimbursement 20 days/ year, this includes max. 10 days/ year for of family care
  • Additional pension plan
  • 300 EUR for regeneration of work force via cafeteria system
  • Recognition and Reward program
  • Wellbeing program – Psychological, Legal and Financial Councelling
  • Family care program (subsidy for newborns, maternity leave, kindergardens, summer camps)
  • Retention program (work anniversary, life anniversary, employee loans)
  • Training and development program (business and product trainings, e-learning, language courses, soft skills trainings,…)
  • Adjustable standing desk as a standard
  • Wide project portfolio in healthcare domain and job rotation within company (Cybersecurity, Artificial Intelligence, Healthcare IT services, …)
  • Participation on world famous IT conferences like Microsoft IGNITE for best employees
  • Opportunity to work on cutting-edge healthcare prototypes with real-world impact.
  • Flexible, innovation driven environment with minimal bureaucracy.
  • Access to internal AI/GenAI tools, training, and communities.
  • Collaboration with senior developers and experts in the medical imaging industry.
  • Support for personal development and continuous learning.

How we work:

When you join Siemens Healthineers, you become one in a global team of scientists, clinicians, developers, researchers, professionals, and skilled specialists, who believe in each individual’s potential to contribute with diverse ideas. We are from different backgrounds, cultures, religions, political and/or sexual orientations, and work together, to fight the world’s most threatening diseases and enable access to care, united by one purpose: to pioneer breakthroughs in healthcare. For everyone. Everywhere. Sustainably. Check our Careers Site at https://www.siemens-healthineers.com/sk

As an equal opportunity employer, we welcome applications from individuals with disabilities.

title: Junior Integration Developer
description_html:
About Technology Consulting

We connect the world of business with technologies from design to implementation. In Technology Consulting, you are not only a part of PwC, but you will also get the opportunity to get to know life in other companies. Usually, we are part of project teams responsible for the design and delivery of innovative and high-quality Business and Technology solutions for our clients in the Czech Republic and other European countries.

We are developing our skill sets not only when working with our clients but also in additional activities. We have six communities, where we learn about specific topics – New Technologies, Digital Strategy, Business Intelligence, SAP, Agile, ESG.

About Your Manager

František Rochovanský leads Integration part of the Business applications team. The team is a dynamic and youthful group of professionals distributed across the Czechia. Despite the geographical distance, we thrive in a remote-first environment, leveraging digital collaboration to stay connected and productive. We actively contribute to international projects across diverse industries, bringing fresh ideas, agility, and a strong drive for innovation. A key strength of our team is our ability to collaborate closely with colleagues and teams from Romania, Poland, Germany, Austria and Slovakia, sharing knowledge, perspectives, and expertise to deliver impactful solutions on a global scale.

This cross-border cooperation not only enriches our work but also fosters a culture of openness, learning, and continuous improvement.

Job Description & Summary

We are looking for an Integration developer to work on SAP S4 and SuccessFactors implementation projects and collaborate with multiple teams to integrate the systems. Participate in projects focusing on integration in the SAP Business Technology Platform utilizing Cloud Integration (SAP BTP CI)

  • Develop integrations and interfaces between different modules of SAP Intelligent Suite and other third-party solutions
  • Prepare technical specifications
  • Work closely with SAP functional (SuccessFactors, HCM, FI, CO, MM etc.) consultant to deliver most fitting solutions

Requirements of the role

  • At least bachelor’s degree in computer science, Management Information Systems or equivalent, master’s degree is preferred
  • Basic understanding of Integration principles and patterns, technologies and protocols (REST/SOAP, ODATA, XML/JSON, XSLT)
  • Basic scripting knowledge (JavaScript, Groovy)
  • Basic database knowledge
  • Experience with SAP technologies is beneficial, but not necessary
  • Analytical and conceptual thinking, problem-solving
  • Fluent in English, German is an advantage

Our Benefits and Fun

  • Concentrated experience and rapid career growth. It may sound like a platitude, but it really is.
  • Fair salary plus annual bonus
  • Paid time off 30 days, 3 wellbeing days and 2 extra days off from the company at the end of the year.
  • High-end Ultrabook and iPhone with unlimited data.
  • Benefit program with 30.000 points that you can use for holidays, education, food vouchers, sports, health... Simply on what you enjoy. 
  • Supporting your development and education: business and digital skills training (e.g. Alteryx, Power BI, Tableau), ongoing training and certifications, e.g. Microsoft (Azure, PowerApps), project management (Prince2, PMI), service management (ITIL), agile development (Scrum, SAFe), DAMA, Salesforce, coaching and presentation skills and more. And various training within our technology communities.
  • Opportunity to work in the future at a foreign PwC office, for example in the USA, Canada and there are others in the selection. 
  • Extra-work activities and Away Days (team building, ski weekend, etc.). 
  • Regular feedback on your work, also consultation with a coach with whom you can address your further development and career direction.

PwC is the largest audit team in the Czech Republic, but also law, tax, consulting and technology, data or forensic teams. Find out how easy it is to combine this knowledge when you're in the right place. With us, you will get the opportunity to see how business is done in large companies. We are part of an international network of companies with more than 364,000 colleagues in 151 countries. At PwC, we create an inclusive work environment where everyone can be themselves and find their place and opportunity to develop. This year, we have successfully maintained the prestigious Equal Pay Certification, making us one of only four companies in the Czech Republic (and the only one from the Big 4) that demonstrably implements fair compensation practices regardless of gender.

Are you interested in our offer? Let us know about yourself and we will discuss more details together!

title: Junior C# Developer (Fixed Term Contract)
description_html:
Veeam, the #1 global market leader in data resilience, believes businesses should control all their data whenever and wherever they need it. Veeam provides data resilience through data backup, data recovery, data portability, data security, and data intelligence. Based in Seattle, Veeam protects over 550,000 customers worldwide who trust Veeam to keep their businesses running. Join us as we move forward together, growing, learning, and making a real impact for some of the world’s biggest brands. The future of data resilience is here - go fearlessly forward with us.

About The Role

Join as a Junior C# Developer on a 1-year fixed contract and help shape Veeam Backup and Replication, enhancing data protection and driving business resilience.

What You'll Do

  • Development of business logic for Veeam Backup and Replication
  • Development of new products and support of existing functionality
  • Participation and individual development of components and the whole architecture of the product

Technologies You'll Work With

C#, .Net 8, Windows/Linux, MS SQL, PostgreSQL, Multithreading

What You'll Bring

  • Good knowledge of C# language
  • A deep understanding of .NET platform, data structures and algorithms
  • Possession of the principles of software design and development
  • English proficiency sufficient to communicate with international teams
  • Experience in basic AWS concepts and services such as VPC, EC2, RDS, etc. (or Azure equivalents) will be a plus

What You'll Get

  • 25 vacation days, four sick days, 21 paid medical leave days, plus 3 extra global VeeaMe Days for self-care
  • Premium private medical insurance for employees and dependents
  • Daily meal vouchers for restaurants and groceries
  • Flexible cafeteria platform with thousands of lifestyle benefit options
  • Multisport Card for gym and wellness, with family add-on options
  • Annual public transport reimbursement up to a set limit
  • Corporate mobile plan with optional family tariff
  • 24 paid volunteer hours annually through Veeam Cares
  • Professional training and education, including courses and workshops, internal meetups, and unlimited access to our online learning platforms (LinkedIn Learning, Athena, O’Reilly) and mentoring through our MentorLab program

Please note: If the applicant is permanently present outside of the Czech Republic, Veeam reserves the right to refuse to consider the application for a job. Remote job is only possible in case the employee is located in the Czech Republic.

Veeam Software is an equal opportunity employer and does not tolerate discrimination in any form on the basis of race, color, religion, gender, age, national origin, citizenship, disability, veteran status or any other classification protected by federal, state or local law. All your information will be kept confidential.

Please note that any personal data collected from you during the recruitment process will be processed in accordance with our Recruiting Privacy Notice.

The Privacy Notice sets out the basis on which the personal data collected from you, or that you provide to us, will be processed by us in connection with our recruitment processes.

By applying for this position, you consent to the processing of your personal data in accordance with our Recruiting Privacy Notice.

By submitting your application, you acknowledge that the information provided in your job application and any supporting documents is complete and accurate to the best of your knowledge. Any misrepresentation, omission, or falsification of information may result in disqualification from consideration for employment or, if discovered after employment begins, termination of employment.

title: Internship Data Analytics - E&BI Dematerialisation Team
description_html:
• Location Prague, Czech Republic
  • Job type: Temporary, Part time
  • Maximum – 20 hours/week, 80 hours/month

About The Job

Join our E&BI Dematerialisation team as a Data Analytics Intern and help future of data-driven decision making at this dynamic uncover meaningful insights, collaborate with PowerBI developers to create the implementation of analytics solutions across the organization. You'll also play a key role in fostering a data-driven culture through community engagement and change management initiatives.

About Sanofi

We're an R&D-driven, AI-powered biopharma company committed to improving people's lives and delivering compelling growth. Our deep understanding of the immune system – and innovative pipeline – enables us to invent medicines and vaccines that treat and protect millions of people around the world. Together, we chase the miracles of science to improve people's lives.

Main Responsibilities

Data Analytics:

  • Analyze and interpret data to identify trends, patterns, and insights that support business decisions
  • Identify connections across different datasets
  • Support PowerBI development teams in building actionable insights
  • Assist stakeholders in translating data analysis requirements into actionable insights

Project Management

  • Support the coordination of data analytics solution implementations across the organization
  • Help track project milestones, deliver with documentation of project requirements and outcomes

Change Management

  • Support data analytics community and contribute to knowledge sharing initiatives with organizational change initiatives related to data-driven decision making
  • Help promote the usage of data-driven insights among EBI teams
  • Support the development of training materials and participate in sessions to enhance data literacy

About You

  • Education: Active University student studying in Czech Republic
  • Availability to work maximum 20 hours per week
  • Basic understanding of data analysis concepts and methods BI and data analytical and problem-solving skills
  • Ability to work collaboratively in cross-functional teams
  • Good knowledge of Excel
  • Good communication skills
  • Languages: Fluent Czech or Slovak and advanced knowledge of English

Why choose us?

  • Gain hands-on experience in leading global biopharma company, building foundational skills for your healthcare career
  • Work with cutting-edge tools like PowerBI and modern data platforms development from experienced data analytics professionals
  • Real impact - your insights will support business decisions across the organization
  • Flexible working arrangements to support your studies
  • Build your career in the growing field of data analytics and business intelligence
  • Build your future with access to mentorship, continuous learning opportunities, and potential career pathways within Sanofi
  • Thrive in Sanofi's Prague office with a supportive, inclusive team culture that values learning and development

nullPursue Progress. Discover Extraordinary.

Join Sanofi and step into a new era of science - where your growth can be just as transformative as the work we do. We invest in you to reach further, think faster, and do what’s never-been-done-before. You’ll help push boundaries, challenge convention, and build smarter solutions that reach the communities we serve. Ready to chase the miracles of science and improve people’s lives? title: Junior Data Engineer
description_html:
Career Area

Technology, Digital and Data

Job Description

Your Work Shapes the World at Caterpillar Inc.

When you join Caterpillar, you're joining a global team who cares not just about the work we do – but also about each other. We are the makers, problem solvers, and future world builders who are creating stronger, more sustainable communities. We don't just talk about progress and innovation here – we make it happen, with our customers, where we work and live. Together, we are building a better world, so we can all enjoy living in it.

Who is CAT Digital? What do we do?

Big machines require big thinking. Are you looking for your next big challenge?

Cat® Digital is the digital and technology arm of Caterpillar Inc., leveraging the latest technologies to build industry leading digital solutions for our customers and dealers. With over one million connected assets worldwide, our teams use data, technology, advanced analytics, telematics, and AI capabilities to help our customers build a better world.

Working with a Fortune 100 leader, you can build your career on a global scale and take advantage of development opportunities with emerging technologies. We’ve created an inclusive environment for you to explore your passions, make an impact and do the work that really matters. Join Us.

Job Opportunity

Cat Digital is expanding its operations and opening a new branch in Slovakia. We are seeking talented individuals to join our team to help us establish and grow our presence, organization, culture, which will drive our digital product development efforts. As a member of our team, you will have the opportunity to work with cutting-edge technologies and collaborate with top professionals working on very high impact and visibility products. Don't miss this chance to join and support digital innovation for a global leader in heavy machinery!

What will you do?

Responsibilities

As a Junior Data Engineer at Cat Digital's new Slovakian branch, you will contribute to design, development and deployment of Caterpillar’s state of the art digital program. You will be responsible for:

  • Development of applications, project management, and complex assignments.
  • Development of application focused around delivering business valuable features.
  • Assist other engineers, providing technical assistance and colaboration.
  • Guiding the team to developing a structured code, new program documentation, operations, documentation, and user guides.
  • Performing integrated testing to ensure timely, quality results.

This position works directly with Slovakia based engineering leadership and Cat Digital IT in the US.

What You Have

  • Knowledge of technical aspects of a software products; ability to design, configure and integrate technical aspects of software products.
  • Effective Communications: Understanding of effective communication concepts, tools and techniques; ability to effectively transmit, receive, and accurately interpret ideas, information, and needs through the application of appropriate communication behaviors.
  • Relevant degree in Computer Science or similar field.
  • Proven experience with software development, testing, creating documentation and working within a team.
  • Experience in designing and developing software applications in Python.
  • Passion for technology and eagerness to contribute to a team-oriented environment.
  • Solid knowledge of computer science fundamentals like data structures and algorithms.
  • Deploying software using CI/CD tools such as Jenkins, GoCD, Azure DevOps etc.
  • Working within an Agile framework (ideally Scrum)

What We Offer

At Cat Digital, we are committed to fostering a culture of innovation and continuous learning, and we believe in investing in the development of our employees. As a member of our team, you will have access to a wide range of training and development opportunities, as well as very competitive compensation and benefits packages, like:

  • 2 300+ euros / month gross
  • Performance related annual cash incentive
  • Industry leading Pension plan
  • 5 days of extra vacation above the legislative requirement
  • Attractive Life insurance
  • 1 volunteering day
  • Multisport Card

Take the chance to apply now for this position at Cat Digital Slovakia branch!

Contract Type

Full-time.

Place Of Work

Kosice, Slovakia

Additional Information

Please frequently check the email associated with your application, including the junk/spam folder, as this is the primary correspondence method. If you wish to know the status of your application – please use the candidate log-in on our career website as it will reflect any updates to your status.

Caterpillar is an Equal Opportunity Employer and considers applicants for all positions without regard to race, color, religion or belief, sex, age, national origin, citizenship status, marital status, military/veteran status, genetic information, sexual orientation, gender identity, physical or mental disability or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws.

Caterpillar is committed to creating a dynamic work environment that values diversity and inclusion, respect and integrity, customer focus, and innovation. For more information, visit https://www.caterpillar.com/en/careers/why-caterpillar.html

Follow us on Facebook, LinkedIn, and YouTube.

LI-DNI

Posting Dates

Caterpillar is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Qualified applicants of any age are encouraged to apply

Not ready to apply? Join our Talent Community.

title: Junior Linux administrator for Integration & Application Support
description_html:
As of 2 September 2025, Vivicta, former Tietoevry Tech Services, now operates as a standalone company under our new brand. We’ve officially launched Vivicta, your trusted Nordic transformation partner, making everyday easier through technology. You can explore more about our brand and what we stand for at https://www.vivicta.com

Ready to join us? Click ‘Apply’ and complete our short application form to get started. Prefer another option? Apply via LinkedIn to automatically populate your details using your profile.

Are you curious about how enterprise systems communicate, run?

Join our team as a Junior Linux administrator for Integration & Application Support and start your journey into the world of enterprise IT operations, automation, and integration platforms.

You’ll be part of a supportive team. We’ll help you develop your skills, understand enterprise systems, and build a strong foundation for your IT career.

If you’re curious, proactive, and ready to grow — this is your place to start.

What You’ll Learn With Us

  • From an integration perspective, gain experience with tools such as IBM QM, IBM ACE, and (optionally) Kafka (Confluent or Apache), RabbitMQ, WSO2, Kubernetes, and Docker.
  • Understand real-world IT environments, develop troubleshooting skills, and grow towards an experienced systems or integration engineer role.

You Will Be Responsible For

  • Get hands-on with Unix/Linux or Windows server administration (experience with at least one commercial Unix/Linux system such as HP-UX, IBM AIX, or Linux servers is a plus).
  • Learn to manage IBM, Oracle, and Open Source products from a Java perspective — including WAS, WLS, OSB, SOA, JBoss, Tomcat, Apache, WildFly, and Nginx.
  • Explore automation scripting — understand how automation works, how servers are structured, where to find logs, and how operating systems work in practice.
  • Work with internal tools like ServiceNow and monitoring systems, solving incidents and problems in line with ITIL standards.
  • Learn to analyze and resolve support tickets — identifying, investigating, and solving technical issues.

We Expect You To Have

  • basic knowledge of Unix/Linux or Windows server administration (experience with at least one commercial Unix/Linux system such as HP-UX, IBM AIX, or Linux servers is a plus).
  • Active English
  • Enthusiastic about learning new technologies and adapting to change.

We Offer

  • The contract is for an indefinite period of time. We count on you! Working on Shift system.
  • Stay fit and fresh. In Ostrava, use the free fitness facilities in the building, in other locations, do sports with Multisport.
  • We'll support you when you're sick. For colleagues who are seriously ill for a long period of time, we contribute to sick pay in excess of the law.
  • 107 CZK meal allowance on top of your salary.
  • Educate yourself. We regularly organise and pay for IT courses, certifications, language training and personal development courses.
  • We contribute from 10 400 CZK per year. You name it. Choose from contributions for pension and life insurance, sports, culture, health, travel or education in the cafeteria.

At Vivicta, we are dedicated to supporting your success on your individual career path, offering opportunities for professional growth. We foster a collaborative culture and partner with leading market vendors on engaging projects across industries.

Our flexible hybrid working model reflects our culture of trust which rooted into our daily operations. We prioritize a healthy work-life balance for our colleagues and embrace openness, curiosity, and continuous learning.

We encourage a mindset of adaptability, ensuring our people stay ahead of emerging trends to deliver innovative solutions and inspire our customers in a rapidly evolving digital landscape.

We conduct background checks for all final candidates, and some roles may require security clearance during hiring or later—always handled within local legislation and with care and confidentiality.

Vivicta is committed to diversity and welcomes applicants of all genders, ages, abilities, ethnicities, orientations, beliefs, and backgrounds. 

Vivicta declines calls from recruitment companies.

title: Intern – Global Real Estate Data Analyst
description_html:
Job Description

We have an opportunity to join our Real Estate team in Prague. The real estate organization consists of an extremely strong team with a mandate from the Corporation; a solid foundation in place that includes industry-leading processes and tools; and an incomparable real estate analytics platform.

This paid role is part of our University Relations program, designed to help students and recent graduates launch their careers with hands-on experience, mentorship, and opportunities for growth within Honeywell.

We have been innovating for more than 100 years and now we’re creating what’s next. Our programs serve a global community and our hometowns too. We provide resources and financial support to causes around the world and encourage employee volunteerism. We are committed to the highest standard in everything we do!

Responsibilities

  • Assist in gathering and compiling data related to the leases database, property management data.
  • Conduct quantitative analyses to identify risks to the Honeywell operations.
  • Collaborate with Real Estate Managers to prepare reports and presentations, effectively communicating findings to stakeholders in English.
  • Stay updated on industry trends, market changes, and emerging technologies impacting the real estate sector.
  • Prepare reports and presentations to communicate findings and recommendations

Qualifications

  • University student currently pursuing a degree in Finance, Real Estate, Economics, Data Analytics, Civil Engineering or another related field. Interest in commercial real estate industry
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with a keen attention to detail.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Excel; familiarity with PowerBI and other data analysis tools (e.g., SQL, Python, R) is a plus.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.
  • Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment and meet deadlines.
  • Strong attention to detail and organizational skills. Ability to work effectively in a cross-functional team environment.

Our offer

  • Hands-on experience in international company working with international team.
  • Opportunity to develop data analysis and visualization skills.
  • If you are passionate about data and eager to learn more about real estate and portfolio – asset management, we encourage you to apply for this exciting internship opportunity at Honeywell
  • Clear pathways for advancement, regular feedback, and mentorship opportunities from experienced professionals in the field
  • Access to online training and certifications.
  • Flexible working arrangements and support for combining work with education.

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.

We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform crucial job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Please contact us to request accommodation.

Join us now and become part of our journey - help us make the future!

#TheFutureIsWhatWeMakeIt

#Futureshaper

About Us

Honeywell helps organizations solve the world's most complex challenges in automation, the future of aviation and energy transition. As a trusted partner, we provide actionable solutions and innovation through our Aerospace Technologies, Building Automation, Energy and Sustainability Solutions, and Industrial Automation business segments – powered by our Honeywell Forge software – that help make the world smarter, safer and more sustainable.

title: Business Intelligence Analyst
description_html:
About The Team

The Business Intelligence team is part of the Digital Enablement department, focused on helping clients digitize their operations and unlock value from their data. We support businesses in adopting new technologies and using data to make better decisions, reduce costs, and improve performance.

Our team works with business intelligence, reporting, and advanced analytics to provide insights that drive both strategic plans and everyday operations. We build scalable data architectures, design real-time data pipelines, and use machine learning and predictive models to detect trends and forecast results.

With clear and easy-to-understand visualizations and reporting tools, we enable clients to make data-driven decisions with confidence.

About Your Manager

Radek is the manager of the team and has long experience in data analytics agenda from projects in the Czech Republic, Great Britain, Switzerland, Canada, United States or in the Middle East region. Apart from project responsibilities, Radek focuses on building trust and openness across the whole team. He believes that everyone in the team has something to learn from each other and therefore grow together. He likes traveling, sports and enjoys time with family.

Job Description & Summary

We are looking for candidates to join our globally focused and agile Digital Enablement team based in Prague. Our team engages in Data Analytics, Data Science, and Data Architecture activities for clients both in the Czech Republic and internationally. We offer the opportunity to work with premier clients, projects, and technologies, enabling you to quickly broaden your experience and develop your skills.

Currently we are looking for a candidate who will initially perform data support for audit business and gradually develop both technical and soft skills to be involved in complex business intelligence projects. We welcome applications from recent graduates and early-career professionals for this junior position, which is ideal for those eager to grow and develop their capabilities.

You will:

  • Provide data support for audit activities by processing and analysing large datasets.
  • Perform data tests and checks to ensure accuracy, consistency, and quality.
  • Actively communicate with clients and audit engagement teams to address data-related requests and resolve issues.
  • Support the implementation and integration of our automated data extraction platform within clients’ systems, ensuring smooth setup and data flow.
  • Assist in managing smaller projects or specific project tasks, contributing to timely and effective delivery.
  • Gradually expand your involvement in broader team activities, including:
  • Gathering and analysing business requirements.
  • Translating business needs into technical specifications.
  • Designing effective data solutions.
  • Creating reports and interactive data visualizations.
  • Automating data flows and processing.
  • Collaborate closely with colleagues in an agile team environment to build innovative, data-driven solutions that align with client needs.

Requirements of the role

  • Interest in working with large datasets and data analysis, with a strong motivation to develop skills in business intelligence and data automation.
  • Good organizational skills and basic understanding of project management, capable of assisting in managing smaller tasks or project parts.
  • Strong attention to detail.
  • Excellent communication skills, able to effectively collaborate with both internal teams and external partners.
  • Willingness to learn new technologies and expand skills in SQL, Power BI, ETL, and other data analysis and visualization tools.
  • Flexibility and adaptability to a dynamic, fast-changing environment, with readiness to work within an international agile team.
  • Basic knowledge of audit processes and IT solution implementations is a plus.
  • Proficiency in English and Czech.

Our benefits & fun

  • Concentrated experience and rapid career growth. It may sound like a platitude, but it really is.
  • Flexible working hours.
  • Fair salary plus paid overtime.
  • Paid time off 20 + 5 days, 3 wellbeing days and 2 extra days off from the company at the end of the year.
  • High-end Ultrabook and iPhone with unlimited data.
  • Benefit program with 30.000 points that you can use for holidays, education, food vouchers, sports, health... Simply on what you enjoy.
  • Support for your education and development: business and digital skills training (e.g. Alteryx, Power BI, Tableau), ongoing training and certification, for example in Microsoft (Azure, PowerApps), project management (Prince2, PMI), service management (ITIL), agile development (Scrum, SAFe), DAMA, Salesforce, coaching and presentation skills and more. We pay for technical certifications and the time you spend studying them.
  • Opportunity to work in the future at a foreign PwC office, for example in the USA, Canada and there are others in the selection.
  • Extra-work activities and Away Days (team building, etc.).
  • Regular feedback on your work, also consultation with a coach with whom you can address your further development and career direction.

Check us out on: Digital Enablement | PwC Czech republic

PwC is the largest audit team in the Czech Republic, but also law, tax, consulting and technology, data or forensic teams. Find out how easy it is to combine this knowledge when you're in the right place. With us, you will get the opportunity to see how business is done in large companies. We are part of an international network of companies with more than 364,000 colleagues in 151 countries. At PwC, we create an inclusive work environment where everyone can be themselves and find their place and opportunity to develop. This year, we have successfully maintained the prestigious Equal Pay Certification, making us one of only four companies in the Czech Republic (and the only one from the Big 4) that demonstrably implements fair compensation practices regardless of gender.

Are you interested in our offer? Let us know about yourself and we will discuss more details together!

title: Digital Media Intern
description_html:
Stážista/ka v mediálním týmu


Už tě nebaví jen teorie ze školy a chceš konečně nakopnout svou kariéru v marketingu?

Zapomeň na vaření kávy a nošení papírů. Hledáme parťáka nebo parťačku na dlouhodobou placenou stáž (2-3 dny v týdnu), kdo se stane plnohodnotnou součástí našeho týmu. Čeká tě výpomoc na kampaních pro známé značky, skvělý kolektiv a zkušenosti, které v žádné učebnici nenajdeš. Jestli se nebojíš čísel a chceš zjistit, jak funguje svět médií zevnitř, pak hledáme právě tebe!


Jsme WPP Media

Propojujeme online a offline kanály. Vytváříme řešení, která se opírají o naše hluboké know-how a často přelomové technologie. A každý den pracujeme s pokročilými AI nástroji i unikátními daty. Potkáváme se v WPP Campusu, kde pod jednou střechou pracují a vzájemně se inspirují stovky profesionálů z oblastí offline, online marketingu, médií i výzkumu.


Co bude náplní tvojí práce?

Budeš pravou rukou do klientského týmu, který pracuje pro přední klienty na trhu.


  • Pomoc s administrativou spojenou s kampaněmi: Budeš evidovat podklady pro mediální kampaně, příprava podkladů pro vyhodnocení kampaní.
  • Práce s daty: Excel se stane tvým kamarádem. Budeš pomáhat s přípravou jednoduchých reportů, analýz a dohledávat potřebná čísla.
  • Komunikace napříč týmy: Nakoukneš pod pokličku komunikace s klienty a budeš v kontaktu s kolegy z různých oddělení.
  • Podpora týmu: Budeš pomáhat s každodenní agendou, ať už půjde o přípravu prezentací nebo rešerše trhu.


Co od tebe očekáváme?

  • Hledáš dlouhodobou spolupráci na rok i více, 2–3 dny v týdnu.
  • Zajímá tě agenturní prostředí.
  • Máš v sobě chuť učit se nové věci, jsi pečlivý/á a nebojíš se zeptat, když něco nevíš.
  • Excel ti naježí chlupy na zádech jen občas. Základní funkce jako sčítání a řazení dat ti nedělají problém.
  • Angličtina pro tebe není španělská vesnice – nebojíš se v ní komunikovat (občas ji využiješ).
  • Obrovskou výhodou je, pokud už jsi do světa médií nebo marketingu někdy nakoukl/a. Ale pokud ne, nevadí – nadšení je pro nás víc.


🎁 Benefity aneb Co nabízíme navíc?

  • Odměna za tvou práci ve výši 200 Kč/hod.
  • Flexibilita a fajn pracovní prostředí.
  • Vybavíme tě noťasem a vším, co k práci budeš potřebovat.
  • Propracovaný onboarding a podpora zkušených kolegů již od prvního dne.
  • Neformální pracovní prostředí, kam se budeš těšit – nejen do práce, ale i na společná večerní týmová setkání 🎉.
  • Zázemí kanceláří WPP Campusu - přímo na metru C Vltavská, 3 minuty od nádraží Bubny, s vlastní jídelnou, odpočinkovými zónami (včetně teras, komunitní zahrádky), kolárnou a sprchami.


🎓 Vzdělávání

  • Přístup k online školením a webinářům. Sdílení know-how z celé skupiny.
  • Přístup do AI platformy WPP Open, která zahrnuje většinu běžně používaných AI modelů.
  • Přednášky, debaty a další aktivity s interními lidmi nebo zajímavými hosty:
  • O mentálním zdraví, ekologii, rovných příležitostech a udržitelnosti...


Láká tě tato stáž? Pošli nám své CV a přidej pár řádků o tom, proč tě láká svět médií a proč bys chtěl/a na stáž právě k nám.

title: Support Engineer (SaaS/Digital) - 12h Shift
description_html:
Please submit your CV in English

🌍 Global SaaS Company | $28M Series B Investment

🚀 Structured mentorship & upskilling | Strong tech curiosity required

📍 Bratislava/Prague - new offices with central locations, 5 days in-office

💰 Salary: 1300-1900 EUR gross + bonus up to 400 EUR gross (or CZK equivalent)

💻 Working Hours:

Working time is divided unequally into short and long weeks as follows:

  • Long weeks: Mon, Tu, Fri, Sat, Sun, working time 8:30am-9.00pm CET
  • Short weeks: Wed & Thu, working time 8:30am-9.00pm CET

In a month, you will have 2 long and 2 short weeks.

What's In It For You

🤖 Product: Be part of building the world's #1 AI business calling platform!

💡 Technical Challenges: Get to learn about challenging technical problems with AI

🚀 Growth: This can be your ticket into the world of AI SaaS, advancing to:

  • Support: Shift Lead, QA Lead
  • Product: L2 Engineer, Technical Consultant, Integration Specialist
  • Customer Success: Customer Success Manager

The Challenge Ahead

As a key player in our Customer Support L1 team, you'll be the hero customers need to provide swift and insightful resolutions for questions about CloudTalk's cutting-edge AI platform. Every AI system breaks somewhere. At CloudTalk, we're building a team of geeks that love finding where and why. If you've ever fixed a bug at 2am just because it was bugging you, we'd love to have you. No worries if you're new to the field; we'll give you all the tools and support you need to succeed. This team is a training ground for future AI technical specialists.

  • Uncover the root cause of anomalies, use AI copilots to propose fixes, and make our systems smarter. You'll troubleshoot real-time voice systems that combine AI, telephony, and SaaS infrastructure
  • Documenting knowledge, helping build a team of AI technical experts
  • Provide top-tier technical support via chat and email to customers
  • Use internal AI copilots to speed up troubleshooting and suggest fixes
  • Analyze call flows, inspect logs, and debug real-time VoIP issues
  • Manage a high volume of conversations, including live chats
  • Represent CloudTalk by resolving issues with empathy and efficiency

Ideal Candidate Profile

At CloudTalk, we value a growth mindset and a passion for learning & improvement. We're seeking curious individuals who measure progress not by the number of responses but by the problems understood & resolved. You should have technical acumen and a genuine interest in technical problems, especially if you're excited to break things down and understand how they work.

You're curious about how AI changes customer experience and excited to explore its role in debugging and support. If you're a collaborator that loves sharing ideas, and continuously improving, you'll fit right in! At CloudTalk, curiosity isn't optional: it's our debugging tool. We celebrate teammates who ask hard questions, and minds that can't stop wondering why something broke.

  • Tech Savvy: You chase down edge cases, you're curious about how systems break
  • Growth Mindset: You're eager to continuously grow your skills and knowledge
  • Self-Starter: You take ownership of your tasks, you work with minimal supervision
  • Languages: English fluent; Spanish is a plus

About CloudTalk

Powered by a 2024 $28 million Series B investment from top investors like KPN Ventures, Lead Ventures, Point 9, and HenQ, CloudTalk's AI-powered business communication platform helps 4,000+ sales and support teams make customer experience the greatest competitive advantage for driving more revenue.

CloudTalk works seamlessly for businesses of all sizes, from scale-ups like Deel and TIER to big players like Nokia, Glovo, and Rakuten. Modern businesses all around the world can lead meaningful conversations while managing calls and messages from one place.

CloudTalk is on a mission to build the world's most capable AI business calling software for sales and support teams to seamlessly connect with their customers. We nurture a strong learning & growth culture - more than 20% of CloudTalkers get promoted/transferred internally every year!

Hiring Process

  • Quick Video Interview
  • Role Deep Dive: Meet your future colleagues
  • Assignment: Have a look into our platform
  • Culture Bar Raiser Call - Explore your potential to raise the bar in adaptability, ownership, and continuous improvement 🎯 Offer!

Benefits Provided

Growth:

💡 1-1 Coaching sessions with our resident communications advisor

📚 Learning and Development Budget

Flexibility:

🏖 Unlimited Paid Time Off

🎗️ Volunteering Days

💻 MacBook for work

Well-being:

🏖Recharge Fridays once per quarter

🏋🏼‍♀️Multisport Card

Connectedness:

💲 Referral bonuses

👥 Virtual & physical team buildings

👕 Company merchandise

By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Cloudtalk will process your personal data based on Cloudtalk's legitimate interest in finding the most suitable candidate and a pre-contractual relationship with you. For more information on how Cloudtalk processes your personal data, please refer to our Privacy Notice.

title: Quality Engineer (41189)
description_html:
Hledám Quality Engineera, který se bude podílet na vytváření moderní testovací strategie a zajištění kvality produktů v celém životním cyklu. Vaším úkolem bude návrh test plánů, manuální testování a postupné přebírání automatizace v Pythonu a nástrojích jako Robot Framework či Playwright. Budete úzce spolupracovat s vývojáři, analyzovat problémy a navrhovat řešení, která posunou kvalitu kódu i produktů kupředu. Pokud máte zkušenosti s manuálním testováním, zájem o automatizaci a chuť učit se nové nástroje, tato role je ideální příležitostí k růstu.

🚀 Projekt

  • návrh, příprava a realizace test plánů a testovacích scénářů
  • provádění manuálních testů a postupné přebírání automatizace
  • podíl na nastavování nástrojů a procesů testovací automatizace
  • úzká spolupráce se softwarovými inženýry a podpora při testování
  • identifikace defektů, jejich reportování, sledování životního cyklu a návrh řešení
  • přispívání k definování QA strategie a zlepšování testovací infrastruktury

🎯 Skills

  • 1–3 roky zkušeností s manuálním testováním
  • základní znalost automatizace testů nebo silná motivace se ji rychle naučit
  • zájem o Python a testovací nástroje (Robot Framework, Playwright aj.)
  • znalost testovacích metodik, typů testů a principů kvality
  • schopnost analyzovat problémy, identifikovat chyby a efektivně je reportovat
  • dobré komunikační dovednosti a schopnost spolupráce v cross-funkčním týmu

💡 Nice to have

  • praktická zkušenost s automatizací (Python, Robot Framework, Playwright)
  • zkušenost s mentoringem nebo vysvětlováním QA postupů vývojářům
  • zkušenost s CI/CD (Jenkins, GitLab CI)
  • znalost Gitu (branch workflow, pull requesty, merge procesy)
  • znalost Agile/Scrum prostředí a DevOps principů

title: Field Service Engr I | Prague
description_html:
Job Description

Internship - Field Service Engineer | Prague

Employment type: Full Time permanent contract

Travel Required? Occasional an upon availability. Mainly Domestic.

Honeywell Process Solutions (HPS) helps industrial customers around the world operate safe, reliable, efficient, sustainable and more profitable facilities. It offers leading technologies from the plant floor to the boardroom as well as comprehensive lifecycle services that help to ensure more productive and stable operations. With more than 12,000 employees around the world, HPS has the global expertise and breadth of resources to execute projects of every size and complexity in the oil and gas, refining, pulp and paper, industrial power generation, chemicals and petrochemicals, biofuels, life sciences, and metals, minerals and mining industries.

Why Join HPS? HPS has an unmatched track record of 40 years+ of system support and continuous evolution, investing for further growth in new capacity, advanced innovations and broader global presence, game-changing automation technology optimizing performance.

To have the job with Honeywell HPS gives unique opportunity to deal with technologies in area of industrial automation, information technologies, operational technologies, cyber security, networking.

The implementation and services and maintenance utilize still more and more features coming from the AI.

Engineering career in Honeywell is unique opportunity for personal development for all people interested in modern technologies and are excited by doing things with innovative thinking.

This role is part of our University Relations program, designed to help students and recent graduates launch their careers with hands-on experience, mentorship, and opportunities for growth within Honeywell.

Responsibilities

In this position you will be responsible for:

  • Maintenance/Troubleshooting/Diagnostics of industrial automation systems. DCS (Distributed Control Systems). These systems integrate comprehensive set of technologies OT, IT, Technological process control and monitoring, networking, cyber security.
  • Maintenance/Troubleshooting/Diagnostics of the ESD (Emergency Shutdown Systems) intended for assurance of functional safety.
  • DCS, ESD installation (hardware/software), commissioning.
  • Networking, Cyber Security: design, implementation, configuration, diagnostics.
  • Provide service related to the upgrades and migrations of the DCS/ESD.
  • Produce technical documentation: system architecture and configuration, network topology.

Qualifications

Key Requirements:.

  • Must speak fluent CZ and English.
  • Knowledge/ Interest in process automation.
  • Knowledge/ Interest in the automation control systems-hardware/software.
  • Knowledge/ Interest in networking and cyber security, virtualization.
  • Driver license.

Nice To Have

  • Experience with the DCS/ESD.
  • Experience with the system software installation, configuration.
  • Basic knowledge about application software configuration.
  • Effective communicator.

We Offer

  • Career Growth: Clear pathways for advancement, regular feedback, and mentorship opportunities.
  • Skill Development: Access to training and certifications.
  • Work-Life Balance: Flexible working arrangements and support for combining work with education.
  • Tech and Innovation: Access to modern tools, technologies, and innovative work environments.
  • Company Culture: Sense of community, team-building activities, and social events.

Equal opportunity statement.

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform crucial job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Please contact us to request accommodation.

Join us now and be part of a global team of thinkers, innovators, dreamers, and doers who make the things that make the future!

#TheFutureIsWhatWeMakeIt

#FutureShaper

#EMEAUR

About Us

Honeywell helps organizations solve the world's most complex challenges in automation, the future of aviation and energy transition. As a trusted partner, we provide actionable solutions and innovation through our Aerospace Technologies, Building Automation, Energy and Sustainability Solutions, and Industrial Automation business segments – powered by our Honeywell Forge software – that help make the world smarter, safer and more sustainable.

title: PLC Programmer
description_html:
At ABB, we help industries outrun - leaner and cleaner. Here, progress is an expectation - for you, your team, and the world. As a global market leader, we’ll give you what you need to make it happen. It won’t always be easy, growing takes grit. But at ABB, you’ll never run alone. Run what runs the world.

This Position reports to:

Department Manager




PLC Programmer

Connect your career with ABB – a global company contributing to the transformation of society and industry towards a more productive and sustainable future.

We are looking for candidates for the position of PLC Programmer at the ABB Operational Center Europe, with branches in Ostrava, Plzeň, and Brno.

In this role, you will work on industrial automation projects in areas such as:

  • Energy, including green energy
  • Marine transportation
  • Mining and mineral processing
  • Pharmaceuticals and chemicals

Examples of real projects we’ve worked on:

  • Jansz-Io project – natural gas extraction using unique subsea power station technology enabling a lower carbon footprint
  • Northvolt project – battery production with an 80% lower carbon footprint compared to fossil fuel-based manufacturing
  • Wonder of the Seas project – complete automation for the world’s largest cruise ship

The work model for the role is: hybrid

This role is contributing to the Process Automation in Ostrava, Plzeň or Brno

You will be mainly accountable for:

  • Programming control applications based on functional specifications
  • Function testing internally and with customers
  • Commissioning equipment at customer sites
  • Documenting project progress and creating technical documentation


Qualifications For The Role

  • At least a high school education in electrical engineering
  • Experience in automation and PLC programming (we provide training for graduates)
  • English at a communicative level (collaboration with international customers and teams)

Benefits

We also offer our employees the following benefits:

  • Possibility of working from home (Home Office) with a financial contribution
  • 25 days of vacation

  • Office with good transport accessibility

  • Possibility to take yoga classes directly at the workplace
  • Table football and darts directly at the workplace
  • Accident insurance
  • Discounts on ABB electrical installation materials
  • Discounts with our partners (electronics, gastronomy, car purchases, train transport, etc.)

A Future Opportunity

Please note that this position is part of our talent pipeline and not an active job opening at this time. By applying, you express your interest in future career opportunities with ABB.

We value people from different backgrounds. Could this be your story? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to learn more about us and see the impact of our work across the globe.

title: Junior konzultant - Audit Brno
description_html:
To nejdůležitější v pár větách

Chceš nastartovat svou kariéru, nakouknout za oponu velkých podniků a za dva roky vést svůj tým? V Auditu pochopíš fungování společností z širokého spektra odvětví, seznámíš se s finančními postupy a naučíš se komunikovat se zástupci různých firem. Prostě hodně dobrá škola businessu.

Tvoje role v týmu

Během auditu trávíme spoustu času u klientů, kde pečlivě procházíme čísla a informace, které o sobě zveřejňují. Ověřujeme jejich pravdivost, aby byli v očích svých obchodních partnerů, akcionářů, věřitelů i veřejnosti důvěryhodní. Ze začátku budeš pracovat spolu se zkušenými kolegy, kteří ti všechno vysvětlí a k ruce dostaneš i counselora, který tě bude provádět nejen auditem, ale pomůže ti i s kariérním růstem.
  • Postupem času poznáš firemní procesy a ovládneš české účetnictví i mezinárodní auditorské a účetní standardy. 
  • Potkáš se se zástupci firem napříč odvětvími a naučíš se s nimi komunikovat. Časem se setkáš i s řediteli a členy boardů. 
  • Audit je neskutečně komplexní proces – finance, účetnictví, daně, oceňování, IT procesy – do všech těchto oblastí budeš moct nahlédnout. Za dva roky z tebe bude senior a povedeš vlastní auditový tým.
  • Ať už bude tvoje kariérní cesta směřovat kamkoliv (třeba i do vlastního businessu), zkušenosti z auditu budou těmi nejlepšími, které můžeš na začátku nasbírat!

Tyhle zkušenosti mají obrovskou hodnotu. Pojď do toho s námi. Získáš práci, při které poznáš spoustu odvětví, rychle porosteš a my se postaráme, aby ti nic nechybělo. Audit spadá do divize s názvem Assurance, kam patří i další týmy: Financial Accounting Advisory Services (FAAS), Forensic and Integrity Services (FIS), Climate Change and Sustainability Services (CCaSS) a Technology Risk (TR). Týmy si mezi sebou vypomáhají v rámci svých agend. Již od letošního roku našim velkým klientům ověřujeme zprávu o udržitelnosti, která je hezkým příkladem spolupráce jak týmu auditorů, tak i ESG odborníku ze CCaSSu. V EY jsme jeden tým a opíráme se o znalosti našich expertů v různých oborech, pojď zkusit být jedním z nich!

Co je pro nás důležité

Víme, že jsi teprve na začátku kariéry. Ale tady je několik věcí, které jsou pro tuhle práci podstatné. 
  • Máš dokončenou vysokou školu nebo budeš mít hotovo v letošním akademickém roce. 
  • Mluvíš a píšeš dobře česky a anglicky. 
  • Pokročilá znalost excelu je velkou výhodou. 
  • Nebude ti vadit cestování. Jezdíme totiž za klienty po celé České republice. 
  • Nastoupit můžeš k 2. 2. 2026.
  • Máš zápal pro věc. Budeš se neustále učit nové věci a denně komunikovat s lidmi od klienta. Čeká tě spousta osobních setkání, e-mailů i telefonování, při kterých musíš něco zjistit nebo zorganizovat.

Jak se ti odměníme

Po dvou letech tě povýšíme na seniorní pozici a v tu chvíli se tvůj plat navýší o 15 000 – 20 000 korun. Na příjemné benefity budeš mít nárok už od začátku. Tady je pár z nich:

  • Volno: 5 týdnů volna a 5x Personal day.
  • Odměna za doporučení kandidáta: Získej od 10 do 70 tisíc Kč za doporučení nového kolegy.
  • Benefitní body: 30 000 v Cafeterii můžeš utratit podle sebe. Třeba si pořídit Multisport kartu, stravenky nebo nakoupit dárky.
  • Bonusový systém založený na tvých výsledcích.
  • Profesionální rozvoj: U nás se neustále učíš a rozvíjíš své schopnosti. Nabízíme ti jedinečný program profesního rozvoje a pestrou paletu kurzů v naší learningové mapě. K tomu ti zaplatíme mezinárodní certifikaci ACCA (k ní dostaneš placené studijní volno) a umožníme ti stát se členem KAČR. Můžeš využívat přístup ke vzdělávacímu portálu Udemy.com a k jazykovým kurzům. Naši kolegové ti poskytnou podporu v podobě counselingu a interního koučinku.
  • iPhone i k soukromému používání.
  • Slevy pro zaměstnance: Užij si skvělé zvýhodněné nabídky na širokou škálu služeb. Využij slevy ve Fruitisimo, Sushi Time, optice, fitness centru BodyBody a na dalších místech.
  • Zdraví a péče: Získej přístup k rychlému a pohodlnému online poradenství uLékaře.cz od kvalifikovaných lékařů. Navíc ti zaplatíme i životní pojištění.
  • Týmová spolupráce a zábava: U nás nejde jen o práci, ale také o zábavu a týmovou spolupráci. Nejen po úspěšném dokončení busy season tě čekají odměny ve formě večeří, firemních večírků a dalších skvělých akcí, které posilují naši týmovou atmosféru. Můžeš se také zapojit do CSR aktivit.

Co tě čeká po zaslání přihlášky

V prvním kole tě čekají online vstupní testy složené z numerické a verbální části a test z angličtiny. Pokud jimi úspěšně projdeš, pozveme tě spolu s ostatními kandidáty k nám do EY na Assessment Centrum. Dozvíš se víc o práci auditora, vyzkoušíš si různé úkoly z praxe a hlavně poznáš naše kolegy. Nakonec si dáme společný oběd, po kterém se dozvíš zpětnou vazbu a celkový výsledek.

title: WMS Superuser (Maternity Leave Cover)
description_html:
JOB PURPOSE:

To provide essential support for warehouse management systems and related technologies, ensuring operational continuity and efficiency. This role focuses on resolving system issues, assisting end-users, and maintaining data accuracy while collaborating with IT and operations teams. By monitoring systems, troubleshooting problems, and contributing to testing and training, you will help drive smooth warehouse processes and reliable system performance.

MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES:


  • Handle IT tickets related to WMS and operational systems.
  • Investigate and solve WMS issues (user errors, system behavior, data checks).
  • Escalate complex incidents to resolver groups and follow up until resolution.
  • Perform daily monitoring of WMS, scanners, printers, labels, and system interfaces.
  • Support end-users on the shop floor with WMS processes and system usage.
  • Execute basic SQL queries to analyze issues and verify data.
  • Participate in testing during system changes, releases, and new implementations.
  • Train users when system changes occur and maintain simple documentation.
  • Support basic IT tasks (accounts, access, devices) in cooperation with IT teams.


This position is being filled for a maternity leave.

Employee perks, benefits


  • Working for a large international company
  • 10% monthly bonus
  • Fully paid meal voucher by the employer in the value of EUR 6,60/day
  • Reward for employee referral (EUR 300)
  • MultiSport card with a contribution from the employer
  • Fully paid life insurance by the employer
  • The possibility of career growth and education
  • Working in a pleasant working environment
  • Opportunities for personal development and professional growth are supported by the necessary educational activities


Further information will be communicated on the interview.

Wage (gross)

Basic salary 1500€ + 10% (150€) bonus

(A final salary package will be the subject of negotiations based on the candidate‘s experience)

Language skills

English - Intermediate (B1) and Slovak - Proficiency (C2)

Personality Requirements And Skills


  • Experience in warehouse operations and understanding of basic warehouse processes.
  • Experience with at least one WMS (preferably Blue Yonder).
  • Basic SQL knowledge (read/write simple queries).


Information about the selection process

The personal data presented in the CV will be processed and stored by DHL Logistics (Slovakia), spol. s.r.o., DHL Exel Slovakia, s.r.o., DHL Supply Chain (Slovakia) s.r.o. in accordance with Act No. 18/2018 Coll. On the Protection of Personal Data as amended. The personal information will be exclusively processed for the purpose of selecting suitable candidates for the advertised vacancy. After the selection process or 6 months the latest after receiving your personal data all your personal information will be destroyed in accordance with the Law. More information on udaje.dhl.com


  • Communicative English (written and spoken).
  • Valid driving license (B).
  • Ability to work in a multi-shift environment.
  • Good communication skills and problem-solving mindset.
  • Other programming or scripting languages are an advantage.

title: Analytická stáž na Ministerstvu financí
company_name: Ministry of Finance of the Czech Republic
description_html:
O příležitosti

Zajímáte se o ekonomii, udržitelný rozvoj, energetiku nebo tvorbu veřejných politik? Hledáte smysluplnou praxi, při které se naučíte něco nového a přispějete ke kvalitnějšímu rozhodování státu na základě dat? Přidejte se k nám na stáž v analytickém týmu Ministerstva financí.


Kdo jsme?

Analytický tým vznikl s cílem podporovat rozhodování státu daty a kvalitními analýzami. Věnujeme se hodnocení dopadů energetických a klimatických politik, návrhům hospodářských opatření pro zvýšení odolnosti a konkurenceschopnosti ekonomiky a hodnocení efektivity alokace veřejných výdajů. Spolupracujeme s odbornými útvary na ministerstvu i dalšími orgány veřejné správy a tvoříme podklady pro reformní politiky České republiky i EU.


Co Vás čeká?

• Tvorba analýz v oblasti hospodářské a fiskální politiky, zpracování dat a rešerší

• Příprava podkladů pro interní i veřejné prezentace

• Získání cenné praxe v prostředí veřejné správy

• Na konkrétním zaměření a rozsahu stáže se lze flexibilně domluvit


Koho hledáme?

Studentku nebo studenta vysoké školy:

• Se zájmem o ekonomii, udržitelnost, energetiku, veřejné finance a/nebo veřejné politiky s kvalitním kvantitativním zázemím

• S analytickým myšlením a chutí pracovat s daty

• Se spolehlivým a samostatným přístupem, ale i týmovým duchem

• S alespoň základní zkušeností s prací s daty (např. Excel, Python nebo R; další nástroje výhodou)

• Se schopností vysvětlení a prezentace vlastních výsledků

• Se znalostí anglického jazyka

• Výhodou předešlá zkušenost s projektovou prací (např. bakalářská práce)


Co nabízíme?

• Smysluplnou a rozmanitou stáž, která má reálný dopad

• Práci v ambiciózním týmu se zahraničními zkušenostmi

• Odměnu 150 Kč/h

• Zaškolení v oblasti analýzy veřejných politik a regulací

• Odborné vedení a přístup ke specializovaným datům a nástrojům

• Možnost využít stáž jako podporu pro vlastní výzkum v rámci bakalářské nebo diplomové práce


Kdy a jak?

• Nástup: dle domluvy (ideálně leden-březen 2026)

• Délka stáže: dle domluvy (preferovaně alespoň 2-3 měsíce)

• Místo: Praha 1, budova Ministerstva financí v Cihelné ulici

• Přihlášky posílejte nejpozději do 10. prosince 2025


Zaujala Vás nabídka? Pošlete nám krátký motivační dopis a svůj životopis na adresu dominik.holly@mfcr.cz.

title: Support Engineer (SaaS/Digital) - 12h Shift
description_html:
Please submit your CV in English

🌍 Global SaaS Company | $28M Series B Investment

🚀 Structured mentorship & upskilling | Strong tech curiosity required

📍 Bratislava/Prague - new offices with central locations, 5 days in-office

💰 Salary: 1300-1900 EUR gross + bonus up to 400 EUR gross (or CZK equivalent)

💻 Working Hours:

Working time is divided unequally into short and long weeks as follows:

  • Long weeks: Mon, Tu, Fri, Sat, Sun, working time 8:30am-9.00pm CET
  • Short weeks: Wed & Thu, working time 8:30am-9.00pm CET

In a month, you will have 2 long and 2 short weeks.

What's In It For You

🤖 Product: Be part of building the world's #1 AI business calling platform!

💡 Technical Challenges: Get to learn about challenging technical problems with AI

🚀 Growth: This can be your ticket into the world of AI SaaS, advancing to:

  • Support: Shift Lead, QA Lead
  • Product: L2 Engineer, Technical Consultant, Integration Specialist
  • Customer Success: Customer Success Manager

The Challenge Ahead

As a key player in our Customer Support L1 team, you'll be the hero customers need to provide swift and insightful resolutions for questions about CloudTalk's cutting-edge AI platform. Every AI system breaks somewhere. At CloudTalk, we're building a team of geeks that love finding where and why. If you've ever fixed a bug at 2am just because it was bugging you, we'd love to have you. No worries if you're new to the field; we'll give you all the tools and support you need to succeed. This team is a training ground for future AI technical specialists.

  • Uncover the root cause of anomalies, use AI copilots to propose fixes, and make our systems smarter. You'll troubleshoot real-time voice systems that combine AI, telephony, and SaaS infrastructure
  • Documenting knowledge, helping build a team of AI technical experts
  • Provide top-tier technical support via chat and email to customers
  • Use internal AI copilots to speed up troubleshooting and suggest fixes
  • Analyze call flows, inspect logs, and debug real-time VoIP issues
  • Manage a high volume of conversations, including live chats
  • Represent CloudTalk by resolving issues with empathy and efficiency

Ideal Candidate Profile

At CloudTalk, we value a growth mindset and a passion for learning & improvement. We're seeking curious individuals who measure progress not by the number of responses but by the problems understood & resolved. You should have technical acumen and a genuine interest in technical problems, especially if you're excited to break things down and understand how they work.

You're curious about how AI changes customer experience and excited to explore its role in debugging and support. If you're a collaborator that loves sharing ideas, and continuously improving, you'll fit right in! At CloudTalk, curiosity isn't optional: it's our debugging tool. We celebrate teammates who ask hard questions, and minds that can't stop wondering why something broke.

  • Tech Savvy: You chase down edge cases, you're curious about how systems break
  • Growth Mindset: You're eager to continuously grow your skills and knowledge
  • Self-Starter: You take ownership of your tasks, you work with minimal supervision
  • Languages: English fluent; Spanish is a plus

About CloudTalk

Powered by a 2024 $28 million Series B investment from top investors like KPN Ventures, Lead Ventures, Point 9, and HenQ, CloudTalk's AI-powered business communication platform helps 4,000+ sales and support teams make customer experience the greatest competitive advantage for driving more revenue.

CloudTalk works seamlessly for businesses of all sizes, from scale-ups like Deel and TIER to big players like Nokia, Glovo, and Rakuten. Modern businesses all around the world can lead meaningful conversations while managing calls and messages from one place.

CloudTalk is on a mission to build the world's most capable AI business calling software for sales and support teams to seamlessly connect with their customers. We nurture a strong learning & growth culture - more than 20% of CloudTalkers get promoted/transferred internally every year!

Hiring Process

  • Quick Video Interview
  • Role Deep Dive: Meet your future colleagues
  • Assignment: Have a look into our platform
  • Culture Bar Raiser Call - Explore your potential to raise the bar in adaptability, ownership, and continuous improvement 🎯 Offer!

Benefits Provided

Growth:

💡 1-1 Coaching sessions with our resident communications advisor

📚 Learning and Development Budget

Flexibility:

🏖 Unlimited Paid Time Off

🎗️ Volunteering Days

💻 MacBook for work

Well-being:

🏖Recharge Fridays once per quarter

🏋🏼‍♀️Multisport Card

Connectedness:

💲 Referral bonuses

👥 Virtual & physical team buildings

👕 Company merchandise

By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Cloudtalk will process your personal data based on Cloudtalk's legitimate interest in finding the most suitable candidate and a pre-contractual relationship with you. For more information on how Cloudtalk processes your personal data, please refer to our Privacy Notice.

title: Kóder newsletterových šablon
description_html:
Do týmu MAFRA hledáme šikovného front-end kodéra, který se postará o tvorbu responzivních e-mailových šablon pro newsletterovou komunikaci. Pokud tě baví kódovat, sleduješ aktuální trendy v HTML/CSS a víš, co funguje v e-mailových klientech, pak hledáme právě tebe!

Náplň práce

  • Kódovat responzivní HTML šablony pro newslettery (zejména pro redakční týmy – iDNES.cz, Metro, Harper´s Bazaar, Cosmopolitan a další.),

Co nabízíme?

  • Zázemí stabilní mediální skupiny MAFRA,
  • možnost práce na dálku / hybridně,

Místo pracoviště Karla Engliše 519/11, 15000 Praha - Smíchov, Česká republika

title: SysAdmin - Windows Server Specialista/ka
description_html:
Máte chuť:

  • Core infrastruktura: Budete mít na starosti Windows Servery – Active Directory, GPO, DNS, DHCP a další základní prvky, na kterých stavíme.
  • Automatizace > Rutina: Pokud lze něco zautomatizovat, uděláme to. Vaše znalost PowerShellu se u nás opravdu neztratí.
  • Modernizace: Nebudete pouze udržovat stávající řešení. Čekají Vás projekty, migrace a posouvání infrastruktury dopředu.
  • Správa koncových bodů: Součástí práce je také dohled nad SCCM, aby bylo vše aktuální a běželo hladce.
  • Virtualizace (Citrix): Pracujeme v prostředí postaveném na Citrixu (VDI, Netscaler). Pokud jej zatím neznáte do hloubky, nevadí – vše se naučíte za pochodu. Budete se podílet na jeho správě a ladění výkonu.

Co byste měl/a mít v malíku (nebo být ochotný/á rychle doplnit)?

  • Windows Server jako Váš druhý domov – víte, kde hledat, když něco nefunguje.
  • PowerShell – nemusíte být programátor, ale měli byste umět napsat skript, který Vám ušetří práci.
  • Selský rozum a analytické myšlení – když něco spadne, zachováte klid a hledáte příčinu.
  • Chuť se rozvíjet v oblastech jako SCCM, Citrix a MS Azure.

Proč do toho jít s námi?

  • Žádný stereotyp: Kombinace klasické správy, virtualizace a projektů.
  • Prostor pro růst: Dostanete se k technologiím, ke kterým se jinde běžně nepustí každý.
  • Fajn tým: Hledáme kolegu, ne „zdroj“. Rádi Vám pomůžeme, když si nebudete jistí.
  • Nadstandardní množství volna (dovolená navíc, sick days apod.).
  • Cafeterii a další benefity podporující váš work-life balance.
  • Smlouvu na HPP na dobu neurčitou.

title: Junior Linux admin - L1
description_html:
Pokud se světem serverů a serverových služeb začínáš tak je pozice L1 pro Tebe ta pravá  
Naši zákazníci často potřebují pomoc v situacích, které nejsou nijak složité, a začínajícímu adminovi poskytnou ideální prostor pro postupné seznámení s portfoliem námi využívaných technologií, od operačních systémů po jednotlivé služby a jejich nastavení. Jedná  se zejména o základní obsluhu hostingových služeb běžících zpravidla na Apache a PHP, práci s SSL certifikáty, práci se systémovými logy nebo mailovými službami, případně práce s našimi cloud servery. 

Při nástupu na pozici juniora si Tě vezme pod křídla zkušený kolega, který bude dbát na Tvůj rozvoj a udělá z Tebe plnohodnotného admina L1 tím, že tě naučí     

  • kompletní správu DNS záznamů domén
  • princip fungování DNS záznamů/DNS serverů
  • princip fungování webového serveru Apache - nezaskočí  Tě základní úkony v .htaccessu, ani vytváření individuálních virtualhostů
  • princip fungování FTP serveru (protokoly FTP, sFTP, FTPs..)
  • princip a složitější nastavení FW a zabezpečení serveru (iptables, nftables, fail2ban)
  • pokročilé úkony v distribucích OS Linux
  • možnost seznámit se s profi světem Windows serverů
  • sloučit monitoring, logy a řešit tickety našich klientů, včetně migrace serverů, domén, hostingů..
  • přístup do našeho cloudu a labu 
  • vzdělávání a rozvoj v naší síťové a bezpečnostní laboratoři 

pro dobrý start bys měl mít  

  • znalost základní práce s OS Linux (příkazová řádka)
  • základní znalost SQL jazyka (jednoduché query)
  • schopnost nastavení jednoduchého firewallu (iptables)
  • schopnost aktivně a v souvislostech přemýšlet nad problematikou..
  • hlavně chuť se zdokonalovat:-)

s výhodou je..

  • znalost práce s webovým serverem (Apache)
  • znalost práce s e-mailovým serverem (postfix)
  • znalost práce s Bashem
  • zkušenosti se správou serverů a znalost algoritmizace

   hodí se ..

  • základní práce s Linux shellem
  • základní práce v BASHi (neměla by Tě zaskočit nutnost napsání základních scriptů)
  • znalost principů webového serveru (u nás se potkáš jak s Apache, nginxem, ale i s HAproxy)
  • základní znalost SQL  (PHPMyAdmin je sice skvělá věc, ale u nás pracujeme hlavně s terminálem:-)

A co Ti nabídneme my?

  • práci která tě bude bavit, nebude nudná a nastartuje tvoji kariéru
  • fajn kolektiv, který Ti vždy pomůže a poradí      nováčkům se věnujeme   
  • každý týden máme společný oběd, volně k dispozici je občerstvení, ovoce, dobrá káva..
  • homeoffice nebo kancelář..záleží na Tobě co Ti víc vyhovuje
  • notebook, mobil, židle, monitory, sluchátka  dle výběru..
  • multisport karta, 4x sick day, 4x free day
  • pracovní smlouva / IČO
  • neformální atmosféra, flexibilní pracovní doba
  • 3D tiskárna a neomezeně materiálu volně k dispozici
  • a samozřejmě práci, která Tě bude bavit:-)

Rádi probereme všechny možnosti spolupráce buď osobně, nebo online.

title: Data Science | Gen AI Intern
description_html:
At Dell Technologies, we are always looking for the next generation of innovative thinkers to drive our business forward. As an intern, you will have the opportunity to work on meaningful projects, partner with professionals across the globe while gaining knowledge about our business. Our mission is to enable the future generation of professionals to create strong networks, achieve critical experiences, and develop core skills that position you for career success.

Join us to do the best work of your career and make a profound impact as a Data Science / Gen AI intern on our Demand Intelligence Team in Bratislava as part of our Demand Intelligence group.

The Demand Intelligence team’s mission is to drive business growth by keeping our customers at the center. Our team uses data, fueled by Generative AI and Machine Learning to listen, understand and act so we can give our customers what they want – while growing Marketing’s contribution to the business.

What you’ll achieve:

You will collaborate with other Gen AI engineers, ML engineers, Data Scientists and our marketing partners to participate in building intelligent solutions that transform how we engage with customers. You will be part of a high-impact initiative leveraging Agentic AI and LLMs to deliver personalized guidance to our sales teams – empowering them to connect our customers with the right solutions.

You will:

  • Support the development of prompt and agentic workflows, machine learning models, and automation experiments by collaborating with experienced team members. Contribute to building insights dashboards and learn about deploying models and workflows to production environments.
  • Assist in creating scalable solutions that span multiple geographies, while learning how to balance performance and customer experience in real-world applications.
  • Work closely with industry-leading professionals in a collaborative environment, gaining hands-on experience and mentorship to help you grow and explore your own path.
  • Explore open-source technologies and contribute to innovative, scalable solutions. Be encouraged to think creatively and flexibly as you apply AI/ML methodologies to real-world problem statements.
  • Contribute to improving algorithms and enhancing customer experience, learning how to deliver the right product, message, and timing through data-driven insights and experimentation.

Essential Requirements

  • Daily University student in the field of Artificial Intelligence, Statistics, Computer Science, Mathematics or other related areas.
  • Knowledge of predictive modeling and / or Agentic AI, LLMs.
  • Knowledge of Python and SQL (especially on data wrangling, analysis, and modeling) plus code versioning tools like Git.
  • Problem solving, analytic skills, and written and oral English communication skills
  • Curiosity and interest in Gen AI, LLMs, NLP

Desirable Requirements

  • Familiarity with State Of The Art techniques and models in the AI space
  • Familiarity on the theory around standard ML methods is a plus: e.g., linear / logistic / regularized regressions, nearest neighbors, k-means, DB scan, collaborative filtering, random forests, xgboost, light gbm, SVM, neural networks, deep neural networks, deep belief networks.

Starting salary from: 7.10 eur / hourly

Who We Are

We believe that each of us has the power to make an impact. That’s why we put our team members at the center of everything we do. If you’re looking for an opportunity to grow your career with some of the best minds and most advanced tech in the industry, we’re looking for you.

Dell Technologies is a unique family of businesses that helps individuals and organizations transform how they work, live and play. Join us to build a future that works for everyone because Progress Takes All of Us.

Application closing date: 30th November 2025

Dell Technologies is committed to the principle of equal employment opportunity for all employees and to providing employees with a work environment free of discrimination and harassment. Read the full Equal Employment Opportunity Policy here.
